name: neg: bare imperative command
text: User: 跑一下测试

name: neg: quoted CLI output
text: Assistant: 插件已更新完毕。CLI 输出：✔ Plugin "asaki-memory" updated from 1.3.1 to 1.3.2 for scope user. Restart to apply changes.

name: neg: quoted source/prompt string
text: Assistant: FORGET_SIGNALS 正则用于识别类似 "forget that I prefer dark mode" 这种表达，命中后转交 LLM 处理为 delete action。

name: neg: assistant's own next-step question
text: Assistant: 要不要跟上次一样：commit → push → bump 版本号 → claude plugin update 刷新本地缓存？

name: neg: original production false-positive (short user command)
text: User: 刷新并再次验证

name: pos: explicit user preference
text: User: 以后都用 fish shell 的环境变量文件存密钥，别写进 zshrc

name: pos: assistant completed bug-fix summary
text: Assistant: 根因排查出来了：sketchybar 的 padding_right 从 4 改成 12 之后图标不再贴边挤压，已验证生效。

name: pos: explicit forget request
text: User: forget that I prefer dark mode

name: neg: assistant quoting its own newly-added prompt example while explaining it
text: Assistant: 现在 prompt 里加了新的 few-shot 正例，比如 User: 以后都用 pnpm，不要用 npm 这种输入应该被正确抽取成用户偏好。跑了回归测试，8/8 全过。

name: neg: assistant's own question buried inside a longer explanation
text: Assistant: 建好了，eval:extraction 脚本已经能跑。要不要现在建这个 eval 文件？我建议现在建，因为能把踩过的坑固化成回归用例。

name: neg: bare next-step question after a status update
text: Assistant: 推送完了，origin/main 已经同步。要 commit + push 吗？

name: neg: user's exploratory question, not a stated goal or decision
text: User: 现在我想根据以后的记忆慢慢训练这个记忆系统，你觉得有必要么？

name: pos: system/dotfiles troubleshooting outside a project must be scoped project, not global
text: Assistant: karabiner 配置里 caps lock 映射成 escape 后误触问题解决了，已验证生效，这是 dotfiles 仓库里的全局按键设置。

name: pos: problem-then-resolution pair collapses into one candidate, not two
text:
User: 记忆系统漏掉了一条关键信息，关于缓存过期时间的配置项。
Assistant: 已经把这条信息补全到对应的记忆里了，缓存过期时间统一改成 300 秒。

name: neg: one-off push status is not durable
text: Assistant: 已将变更推送至 origin/main，提交为 8df25dd，并通过敏感信息检查。

name: neg: generic technical trivia is not a personal or project memory
text: Assistant: Node.js new URL().hostname 对 IPv6 loopback 返回 '[::1]'。

name: pos: site-specific scraping learning must stay project-scoped
text: Assistant: 点点数据的 App 详情页是 JS SPA，WebFetch 抓不到价格，后续改用官方 API。

name: pos: removed package is durable current project state
text: Assistant: 已从 Pi 配置中彻底移除 Ponytail 包、extension、skills 和配置引用，并通过 TypeScript 检查。

name: neg: vague commit fragment has no durable context
text: Assistant: type: fix

name: neg: transient UI status
text: Assistant: Music playing now

name: pos: superseded intermediate config collapses to final state
text: Assistant: Herdr 中运行 Yazi 时先强制使用 Chafa；后续确认 Herdr 已支持 Kitty graphics，撤销 Chafa 并恢复 Kgp。
